svg.font-family: IBM Plex Sans, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
svg.title: Target architecture
svg.desc: This iteration: Causal Intelligence Studio -- a 10-node mechanism Bayesian network (IN_FULL_FAILURE / LATE_DELIVERY -> OTIF_MISS) plus exact structural do-operator scenarios, decision-support only.

text.font-family: Barlow Condensed, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
